phrases.intent_en: Where is the Yamakasa float display?
phrases.text_local: やまかさの かざりやまは どこにありますか？
phrases.cultural_note: The elaborate Kakiyama festival floats are on static display at specific locations in the old town throughout the year.

likely_response.local: くしだじんじゃの てまえ、みぎがわだよ。
likely_response.translation_en: Just before Kushida Shrine, on the right.

responses.english: Just before Kushida Shrine, on the right.
responses.local: くしだじんじゃの てまえ、みぎがわだよ。

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Kushida Jinja omamori counter?
phrases.text_local: くしだじんじゃの おまもりうりばは どこですか？
phrases.cultural_note: Shrine amulets are typically sold at a dedicated window or building called a juyosho, often near the main hall.

likely_response.local: ほんどうの ひだりがわです。
likely_response.translation_en: It's on the left side of the main hall.

responses.english: It's on the left side of the main hall.
responses.local: ほんどうの ひだりがわです。

phrases.intent_en: Where can I find festival food stalls?
phrases.text_local: おまつりの やたいは どこですか？
phrases.cultural_note: During the Yamakasa festival, many yatai food stalls set up along the Naka River and around the shrine area.

likely_response.local: かわぞいに ずらっとならんでるよ。
likely_response.translation_en: They're all lined up along the river.

responses.english: They're all lined up along the river.
responses.local: かわぞいに ずらっとならんでるよ。

phrases.intent_en: How do I get to Joten-ji temple?
phrases.text_local: じょうてんじには どうやって いけばいいですか？
phrases.cultural_note: Joten-ji is known as the origin of Hakata's udon and soba culture, a historic Zen temple in the old town.

likely_response.local: このみちを まっすぐ、つきあたりです。
likely_response.translation_en: Straight down this road, at the very end.

responses.english: Straight down this road, at the very end.
responses.local: このみちを まっすぐ、つきあたりです。

phrases.intent_en: Is there parking near the machiya museum?
phrases.text_local: まちやはくぶつかんの ちかくに ちゅうしゃじょうは ありますか？
phrases.cultural_note: The Hakata Machiya Folk Museum is a restored traditional townhouse showcasing local crafts and history.

likely_response.local: うらどおりに コインパーキングが あります。
likely_response.translation_en: There's a coin parking lot on the back street.

responses.english: There's a coin parking lot on the back street.
responses.local: うらどおりに コインパーキングが あります。
